name: ExtensionBiologicallyDerivedProductDispense_BasedOn
title: R5: The order or request that this dispense is fulfilling (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.basedOn` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.basedOn` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ServiceRequest)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.basedOn` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ServiceRequest)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.basedOn` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense` is not mapped.
Element `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.basedOn` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
